question: On what date did Amazon employees stage a walkout at the company's Seattle headquarters to protest the return-to-office mandate and changes to the climate policy, and what consequence did employees face for violating the prior 3-day office requirement?
answer: On May 31, 2023, employees staged a walkout at Amazon's Seattle headquarters to protest the return-to-office mandate and climate policy changes. Separately, employees who consistently violated the existing 3-day office mandate were informed they were voluntarily resigning and were locked out of Amazon systems.

video: A large group of people gather outdoors for a protest, holding signs with various messages, dated May 31, 2023.
text: In May of last year, workers at Amazon Seattle headquarters staged a walkout protesting the return-to-office mandate and changes to the company's climate policy.
Some employees consistently violating the existing 3-day office mandate were informed they were voluntarily resigning and were locked out of Amazon systems.
